text:
<think>The question gives several clues: former mayor, billionaire businessman, technology industry, three kids, first name Bill. I need to think through prominent people named Bill who fit these criteria. Bill Gates is a famous billionaire in technology with three children, but he was never a mayor. Bill de Blasio was a mayor (of New York City), but he is not a billionaire or known for technology. Bill Gates seems to fit most clues except the mayor part, so I should clarify this in my answer.</think>
The person who best fits your description is Bill Gates, who is a famous billionaire businessman in technology and has three children, but he was never a mayor. 
<think>I should mention that there is no well-known billionaire tech businessman named Bill who was also a mayor, clarifying any possible confusion.</think>
There is no widely-known former mayor named Bill who is both a billionaire and has worked in technology. 
<think>I should further point out that sometimes clues are mixed from different individuals, leading to a composite that doesn't match any single person.</think>
It's possible that the details in your question combine traits from different people.
